bullets: Civilians across Gaza facing ongoing airstrikes, displacement, and a deteriorating ceasefire amid escalating military operations and humanitarian collapse.
Civilian populations in southern Lebanon facing advancing military occupation, urban encirclement, and pressure on overstretched national defense forces.
Indonesian communities near an erupting volcano living under ongoing ash fall and a 3-kilometre exclusion zone preventing return to their homes.
Stranded and displaced farmers and communities in eastern Syria cut off by severe flooding and a collapsed bridge along the Euphrates River.
Australian farming families in two states whose crops and homes are overwhelmed by a devastating mouse plague threatening their livelihoods and food security.
Rescue teams and the families of two men still missing after several gold seekers were trapped for ten days in a flood-filled cave system.
Thousands of people across eastern Congo and neighboring Uganda exposed to a rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak with over 1,000 suspected cases and hundreds of deaths.
Millions of residents across Japan recovering from a typhoon bringing dangerous Category 1 winds and heavy rainfall across wide areas of the country.
Communities in Papua New Guinea and the broader Pacific region regularly exposed to seismic activity and the ongoing risks of living in one of the world's most earthquake-prone zones.
